codeSystems.name: AdministrativeGender
codeSystems.title: AdministrativeGender
codeSystems.description: The gender of a person used for administrative purposes.

codeSystems.name: AllergyIntoleranceCategory
codeSystems.title: AllergyIntoleranceCategory
codeSystems.description: Category of an identified substance associated with allergies or intolerances.

codeSystems.name: AllergyIntoleranceCriticality
codeSystems.title: AllergyIntoleranceCriticality
codeSystems.description: Estimate of the potential clinical harm, or seriousness, of a reaction to an identified substance.

codeSystems.name: AllergyIntoleranceType
codeSystems.title: AllergyIntoleranceType
codeSystems.description: Identification of the underlying physiological mechanism for a Reaction Risk.

codeSystems.name: AllergyIntoleranceClinicalStatusCodes
codeSystems.title: AllergyIntolerance Clinical Status Codes
codeSystems.description: Preferred value set for AllergyIntolerance Clinical Status.

codeSystems.name: AllergyIntoleranceSubstance/Product,ConditionAndNegationCodes
codeSystems.title: AllergyIntolerance Substance/Product, Condition and Negation Codes
codeSystems.description: This value set includes concept codes for specific substances/pharmaceutical products, allergy or intolerance conditions, and negation/exclusion codes to specify the absence of specific types of allergies or intolerances.

codeSystems.name: AllergyIntoleranceVerificationStatusCodes
codeSystems.title: AllergyIntolerance Verification Status Codes
codeSystems.description: Preferred value set for AllergyIntolerance Verification Status.

codeSystems.name: SNOMEDCTBodyStructures
codeSystems.title: SNOMED CT Body Structures
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all codes from [SNOMED CT](http://snomed.info/sct) where concept is-a 442083009 (Anatomical or acquired body site (body structure)).

codeSystems.name: PracticeSettingCodeValueSet
codeSystems.title: Practice Setting Code Value Set
codeSystems.description: This is the code representing the clinical specialty of the clinician or provider who interacted with, treated, or provided a service to/for the patient. The value set used for clinical specialty has been limited by HITSP to the value set reproduced from HITSP C80 Table 2-149 Clinical Specialty Value Set Definition.

codeSystems.name: SNOMEDCTClinicalFindings
codeSystems.title: SNOMED CT Clinical Findings
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all the "Clinical finding" [SNOMED CT](http://snomed.info/sct) codes - concepts where concept is-a 404684003 (Clinical finding (finding)).

codeSystems.name: ConditionCategoryCodes
codeSystems.title: Condition Category Codes
codeSystems.description: Preferred value set for Condition Categories.

codeSystems.name: ConditionClinicalStatusCodes
codeSystems.title: Condition Clinical Status Codes
codeSystems.description: Preferred value set for Condition Clinical Status.

codeSystems.name: Condition/Problem/DiagnosisCodes
codeSystems.title: Condition/Problem/Diagnosis Codes
codeSystems.description: Example value set for Condition/Problem/Diagnosis codes.

codeSystems.name: Condition/DiagnosisSeverity
codeSystems.title: Condition/Diagnosis Severity
codeSystems.description: Preferred value set for Condition/Diagnosis severity grading.

codeSystems.name: ConditionStage
codeSystems.title: Condition Stage
codeSystems.description: Example value set for stages of cancer and other conditions.

codeSystems.name: ConditionStageType
codeSystems.title: Condition Stage Type
codeSystems.description: Example value set for the type of stages of cancer and other conditions

codeSystems.name: ConditionVerificationStatus
codeSystems.title: ConditionVerificationStatus
codeSystems.description: The verification status to support or decline the clinical status of the condition or diagnosis.

codeSystems.name: ContactEntityType
codeSystems.description: This example value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate the purpose for which you would contact a contact party.

codeSystems.name: DaysOfWeek
codeSystems.title: DaysOfWeek
codeSystems.description: The days of the week.

codeSystems.name: CommonLanguages
codeSystems.title: Common Languages
codeSystems.description: This value set includes common codes from BCP-47 (http://tools.ietf.org/html/bcp47)

codeSystems.name: LinkType
codeSystems.title: LinkType
codeSystems.description: The type of link between this patient resource and another patient resource.

codeSystems.name: ManifestationAndSymptomCodes
codeSystems.title: Manifestation and Symptom Codes
codeSystems.description: Example value set for Manifestation and Symptom codes.

codeSystems.name: Marital Status Codes
codeSystems.title: MaritalStatus
codeSystems.description: This value set defines the set of codes that can be used to indicate the marital status of a person.

codeSystems.name: NameUse
codeSystems.title: NameUse
codeSystems.description: The use of a human name.

codeSystems.name: OrganizationType
codeSystems.description: This example value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate a type of organization.

codeSystems.name: PatientContactRelationship
codeSystems.title: Patient Contact Relationship
codeSystems.description: The nature of the relationship between the patient and the contact person.

codeSystems.name: PractitionerRole
codeSystems.title: Practitioner role
codeSystems.description: This example value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate the role of a Practitioner.

codeSystems.name: AllergyIntoleranceSeverity
codeSystems.title: AllergyIntoleranceSeverity
codeSystems.description: Clinical assessment of the severity of a reaction event as a whole, potentially considering multiple different manifestations.

codeSystems.name: SNOMEDCTRouteCodes
codeSystems.title: SNOMED CT Route Codes
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all Route codes from SNOMED CT - provided as an exemplar.

codeSystems.name: SubstanceCode
codeSystems.title: Substance Code
codeSystems.description: This value set contains concept codes for specific substances. It includes codes from [SNOMED](http://snomed.info/sct) where concept is-a 105590001 (Substance (substance))

codeSystems.name: v2.0360.2.7
